_meta.note: Pre-seeded pipeline + outcome history for the public sandbox tenant. Loaded by loadSandbox() so the hourly reset always restores a populated Pipeline and Learnings view. This is what lets a reviewer experience the full feedback loop (outcomes, lessons, ROI, calibration) with zero setup. All opportunities are illustrative DoW SBIR/STTR topics; no real award data.
_meta.calibration_note: 5 terminal awarded/rejected outcomes meet CALIBRATION_THRESHOLD so the calibration report renders immediately.

items.title: Verifiable autonomy stack for robotic combat vehicles
items.notes: Off-road perception Phase II directly extends our awarded A234-001 work. Government POC engaged early; sandbox validation cited as differentiator.

outcome.what_worked: Receipts-native traversability logs let the evaluators audit every autonomy decision. The Why panel evidence chain matched the topic objective almost line for line.

items.title: Onboard rendezvous and proximity operations decision provenance
items.notes: Space Force routed separately from the open BAA. Decision-provenance framing landed well with the SDA program office.

outcome.what_worked: Tied onboard autonomy to an auditable provenance chain. University partner covered the orbit-determination gap the reviewers flagged in Phase I.

items.title: Attestable inference for autonomous decisions in DDIL environments
items.notes: DARPA AIE fast-track. Attestation story is our strongest; DDIL constraints matched the sandbox demo exactly.

outcome.what_worked: Attestation receipts gave the evaluators a verifiable AI assurance argument. Demo ran fully disconnected, which the topic explicitly required.

items.title: Edge data fusion for kill web composability
items.notes: AFWERX battle-network topic. Strong tech fit but the ceiling was well below our build estimate.

outcome.what_failed: Scoped to the topic ceiling but the evaluation wanted a wider CJADC2 integration than the budget supported.
outcome.rejection_reason: Budget mismatch — proposed scope exceeded the topic funding ceiling.

items.title: Soldier-borne sensor fusion for dismounted situational awareness
items.notes: Adjacent to our autonomy work but the maturity ask was higher than our Phase I prototype.

outcome.what_failed: Reviewers wanted a higher TRL than our prototype demonstrated. Domain framing was fine; the readiness gap sank it.
outcome.rejection_reason: TRL too low — prototype maturity below what the topic expected.

items.title: AI governance attestation framework for autonomous weapon review
items.notes: Strong mission fit, but it collided with the DARPA AIE timeline. Pulled it to protect the higher-probability submission.

outcome.rejection_reason: Deadline overlapped the DARPA AIE submission; withdrew to protect the higher-probability bid.

items.title: CBRN sensor data fusion for contested logistics nodes
items.notes: Watching for the formal topic release. Data-fusion core reuses our kill-web pipeline.

items.title: Cislunar space domain awareness tracking and custody
items.notes: Drafting now. Extends the SF234-D2 provenance chain to cislunar custody hand-offs.
